titleStmt.title: SII 23.381: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 381. (A.R. No. 381 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Pañchanadēśvara temple—on the east wall of the same maṇḍapa Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 25: 1201-02 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription gives the same short introduction of the king and the details of date also are the same.

This registers a gift of two pieces of land measuring 7 mā and odd in extent by the Brāhmaṇa and Veḷḷāḷa land owners of Śivapādaśēkhara-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to the temple of Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyār so as to provide it with 60 kalam of paddy per year free of any taxes (iṟai). This paddy is said to have been originally measured out to the temple of Śoṉṉavāṟaṟivār of which their village was the dēvadāna but was now transferred therefrom for reasons not stated. The donors undertook to pay the iṟai on the lands themselves and also not to collect the antarāyam (rent ?) which seems to have been due from such tax-free lands.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ
maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiya
ṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya ku
lottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu
Irupattaiñcāvatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrva
pakṣattu catuttaciyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamai
yum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ jayaṅko
ṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭ
ṭu kulottuṅka coḻaṉ kuṟṟālattu Uṭai
yār tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭe
curatevarkku Uṭaiyār coṉṉa
vatānam Iṉṉāṭṭu Araiya brammadeyamā
ṉa civapātacekaraccaruppetimaṅkalattu
p pirāmaṇak kāṇiyāḷarum veḷḷā
ḷa kāṇiyāḷarum Ivvaṉaivom Iṉ
ṉāyaṉār śrīhastattu Iṟṟaināḷāl
nirvārttu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta
nellu Aṟupatiṉ kalattukku yiv
vūril nāṅkaḷ Iṟukka nikkiṉa nilamāva
tu Ivvūr karuṇākaravatikku kiḻakku pira
naṅkaivatikku teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu
viḷaṅkuṭaiyāṉ
riyātāṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattu nikkiṉa payir Aṭai
ppiṉpaṭi meṟkaṭaiya ka Irunūṟṟuk
kalavaricai nilam nāṉmāvarai Araikkāṇiyinā
l nellu nāṟpattu Aṟukalaṉe mukkuṟu
ṇiyum Iṅke Oru pū nilam Iraṇṭu mā mukkā
ṇikku veliyāl nellu nūṟṟukkala
māka nellu patiṉmukkalamum Irutūṇikku
ṟuṇiyum Āka kārmaṟuvum Oru pūvum nilam
Eḻu mākkāṇiyaraikkāṇiyiṉāl Oṭṭu
ppaṭi nellu Aṟupatiṉkalam Iṉnel
lu Aṟupatiṉkalamum Iṟukkumiṭattu I
vvāṇṭu pacāṉamutal Uṭaiyār coṉṉa
vāṟṟivār koyilil Iṟuppu tavittu U
ṭaiyār tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār koyilukku I
ṟukka kaṭavatākavum Innellu Aṟupatiṉ
kalamum Ūril Eṟṟi Iṟukkumiṭattu muṉpuṭai
kkiḻ Iṟaiyiliāka viṭṭa nilattukku Eṟṟa Iṟuttu varukiṟapaṭi
yāle Iṉnellum nilavopātittu Eṟṟi Iṟukkakaṭavomā
kavum Iṉnilattukku Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili Opāti Antarāyaṅ koḷḷa
kkaṭavomallātomākavum
mmatittu Iṉṉilam Eḻumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi
patiṉkalamum cantirātittavaṟ Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭutto
m Uṭaiyār tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭecuratevaṟku Ivvaṉaivom
paṇiyāl Ūrkaṇakku muḷḷūruṭaiyāṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ tiru naṭṭamāṭiyeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 23.381 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
